---
title: Quick Start
---

### Accessing Pure

VU researchers will automatically have a personal account in Pure. You can [log in](https://research.vu.nl/admin/workspace.xhtml) to Pure using your VUnetID and password. 

### Manage your personal profile

You can find more information about managing your personal profile in our [LibGuide](https://libguides.vu.nl/manage-pure-profile). 

linking your ORCID to Pure ensures that all your publications are automatically added to your ORCID profile. You can find more information on linking ORCID to Pure in this [libguide](https://libguides.vu.nl/orcid/register).

### Adding research outputs

You can visit this [manual](https://libguides.vu.nl/pure-managing-publications) for more information on registering different types of research output.  

For more information about [dataset registration](data-registration.qmd) and [software registration](software-registration.qmd) you can visit our Research Support Handbook

Please note that the [Research Data and Software Management Policy](/topics/research-data-and-software-management-policy.qmd) states that archived and published data and software must be registered in Pure. This is not done automatically. Researchers are therefore advised to check their registrations and ensure they are complete. If archived or published data or software has not been included in your Pure profile, you need to add these registrations manually, as explained in the manual mentioned above.
